title: Automatically copy data from website and insert into Monday
excerpt:
Hello dear community, 
I was wondering about possible solutions to realize this scenario:

2 - insert it to public website and run a search 
3 - copy results (date) into Mon…

posts.author: costavia (costa via)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello dear community,

I was wondering about possible solutions to realize this scenario:
1 - copy a column (number) from Monday board.
2 - insert it to public website and run a search
3 - copy results (date) into Monday (update a current date for column number)

API coding would be an obvious solution, but I was wondering if it can be done through Intergromat or other non-coding solution,

Thank you!

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @costavia,

Using the Toolkit app, you can copy data from anywhere directly into your monday.com columns, not automatically though
